title: Magma Vision
description: Adds a potion effect that allows you to see through and inside lava clearly
body:
## About:

Magma vision as the name implies adds a new status effect that allows you to not only see when inside lava but unlike most other mods see through lava as well when your outside lava.

A very helpful tool for when spelunking in lava filled caverns.

---
